examples: His telescopic observations are justly immortal.
Telescopic views reveal the spectacular cluster's hundreds of thousands of stars.
Normally faint and elusive, the Jellyfish Nebula is caught in this alluring, false-color, telescopic view.
They brought in sniffer dogs and telescopic cameras over a number if days, even searching the attic.
Looking through the rifle's telescopic sight, the gunman then estimates the distance from this object to the target.
